requirements.summary: Remove the Gallery section from the landing page including component removal and navigation link cleanup
acceptanceCriteria: The Gallery section is no longer rendered on the landing page.
No broken anchor links to the gallery section remain in the header or footer navigation.
All other sections remain intact and unaffected.

file_operations.description: Remove the GallerySection import statement and the <GallerySection /> component from the page composition. Ensure all other section components remain in their current rendering order.
Remove any navigation link that points to the gallery section anchor (e.g., href='#gallery'). Update both the desktop nav links array and the mobile sheet menu items to exclude the gallery link.
Remove any quick navigation link that points to the gallery section anchor (e.g., href='#gallery'). Ensure remaining footer links are properly formatted and functional.
